name: pr_tms_cycle_ctl
drl:
rule RM when Ord(v > 0) then insertLogical(new Mid("m")); end
rule RML when Mid(k == "m") then insertLogical(new Leaf("l")); end
_finding: The acyclic control for pr_tms_cycle: same chain WITHOUT the cycle-closing back-edge. Deleting the root cascades the whole derivation - Mid retracts, then Leaf. Isolates the cycle cell's orphan to CIRCULAR support specifically, not to chain depth.
